## Summary

Upgrades the public Revise page so it clearly explains the two revision paths:

- Manual Revise Queue for author-controlled repair decisions.
- TrustedPath™ for one-click governed automation using eligible Option A repairs.

## Changes

- Replaces generic Revise positioning with a clear choose-your-path frame.
- Defines Revise Queue as explicit author control: accept, keep original, reject, defer, or write custom.
- Defines TrustedPath™ as governed automation that applies eligible Option A repairs to a duplicate manuscript draft.
- Adds the A/B/C option model:
  - A — Recommended
  - B — Conservative
  - C — Bold
- Adds safeguards: original preserved, duplicate revised draft, changelog, skipped low-confidence/high voice-risk items, follow-up re-evaluation.
- Clarifies that revision activity is not measured improvement until a follow-up evaluation confirms movement.

## Scope

Public copy/page structure only. No backend, database, Revise runtime, TrustedPath runtime, evaluation, scoring, or pipeline logic changed.
